allow: Bash(git add docs/index.html docs/data/biobanks.json docs/data/summary.json docs/js/charts.js tree.txt)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Align webapp with HEIM manuscript \(Corpas et al. 2025\)

Synchronize dashboard with paper: Health Equity Informative Metrics \(HEIM\):
Quantifying Research Alignment Across 70 Global Biobanks

Key changes:
- Update EAS categories: Strong/Weak/Poor → High/Moderate/Low
- Update EAS thresholds: 70/50/30 → 70/40 \(per paper methodology\)
- Fix citation: Corpas M, Valdivia-Silva J, Fatumo S, Guio H
- Remove obsolete Dataset Versions section
- Update filter dropdown labels

Verified statistics match paper:
- 70 IHCC biobanks, 29 countries
- 38,595 publications, 179 disease categories
- Alignment ratio: 57.8:1
- EAS: 1 High \(1.4%\), 13 Moderate \(18.6%\), 56 Low \(80%\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
